title: Decadent Cheese Pull Korean Chicken Noodles
description: A rich and comforting Korean dish featuring Grand Marnier and a decadent cheese pull, perfect for a sick day, cooked in a clay pot and served in a dolsot stone bowl.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a clay pot over medium heat.
Add the chicken to the pot and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the Korean chili flakes, soy sauce, Grand Marnier, brown sugar, garlic, and ginger to the pot and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Cook the noodles according to the package instructions and set aside.
Add the cooked noodles to the pot and stir to combine with the chicken and sauce.
Top the noodles with the shredded mozzarella cheese and cover the pot with a lid.
Transfer the pot to the oven and bake at 375 degrees for 10 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the pot from the oven and top with chopped green onions.
Serve the noodles in a dolsot stone bowl and enjoy.
